hints.text: UK territory in the South Pacific — **counts as UK** in streaks; coverage limited to **Pitcairn Island + Henderson Island**, all **Gen3 trekker**
Semi-tropical, **densely forested**; mostly small **dirt tracks** through forest; soil commonly **very red**
hints.uniq_note: Red-dirt forest trekker in the Pacific → Pitcairn.

hints.text: **Adamstown** = the ONLY settlement (NE shore); some town roads are concrete instead of dirt; **'The Landing'** dock at the eastern end = lots of small ATVs
**Henderson Island**: only two **white-sand beaches** covered (north + east shore)
